name: co-desk
description: Co-Desk desktop client with a FastAPI backend for an HCI course project.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,VITE,ELECTRON -c green,cyan,magenta "python server/main.py" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8124 http://127.0.0.1:5173 && electron ."
scripts.stop:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8124,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
